community.inactiveHint: Sharing is on, but the endpoint is not verified yet — nothing is being sent. Run Test connection to activate it.
community.keyHint: Stored encrypted. Leave blank to keep the existing key.
community.optInHint: Off by default. When enabled, only anonymized, salted-hashed indicators are shared. Your IP addresses, process names, and hostnames never leave this device.
community.previewEmpty: No qualifying indicators right now. When a threat at or above your severity floor is detected, its anonymized indicator appears here before it is shared.
community.previewHint: This is exactly what the next submission contains. Nothing else is sent.
community.saved: Settings saved. Run Test connection to verify the endpoint.
community.subtitle: Help the community spot emerging threats — privately.
community.testFailed: Could not reach the endpoint. Check the URL and API key.
community.testOk: Connection verified. Sharing is now active.
community.tierLocked: Community threat intelligence is available on the Pro tier.

remote.emptyListening: No agents connected yet. Point an agent at ws://{host}:{port} to get started.
remote.emptyStopped: The bridge server is not running. Enable it in Settings to accept agent connections.
remote.events.emptyMessage: Alerts and status events from connected agents will appear here.
remote.loopbackHint: The server is listening on 127.0.0.1, so only agents on this machine can connect. Change the listen host in Settings to accept agents from your network.

settings.about.title: About
settings.accessControl.enableHint: Require sign in for privileged actions
settings.accessControl.note: Role-based access control enforces scopes at the IPC boundary. When enabled, privileged channels require an authenticated admin session.
settings.accessControl.title: Access Control
settings.ai.apiKeyHint: Your API key is encrypted before storage
settings.ai.customEndpointHint: Optional OpenAI-compatible base URL (self-hosted vLLM/LM Studio)
settings.ai.encryptionNote: API keys are encrypted with AES-256 and never leave this device.
settings.ai.keyVerified: Key verified successfully — ready to save.
settings.ai.title: AI Configuration
settings.ai.transparencyHint: Inspect the exact anonymized data sent for analysis
settings.appearance.themeHint: Choose light, dark, or follow your system setting
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.compliance.exportFailed: PDF export failed — sign in with the export-reports scope and try again.
settings.compliance.exportNoData: PDF export returned no data — generate a report first.
settings.compliance.generateFailed: Report generation failed — sign in with the export-reports scope and try again.
settings.compliance.note: Reports evaluate live posture against the selected framework. When access control is enabled, generation and export require a signed-in user with the export-reports scope.
settings.compliance.title: Compliance
settings.defense.enableHint: Surface manual kill and block actions when threats are detected
settings.defense.enableWebhookHint: Send detected threats to the configured webhook URL
settings.defense.note: Defense actions always require manual confirmation. Webhook payloads contain only alert metadata.
settings.defense.testFail: Webhook test failed — check the URL and try again.
settings.defense.title: Active Defense & Alerts
settings.defense.webhookUrlHint: Slack, Discord, or a generic JSON webhook URL
settings.insider.emptyMessage: Suspicious process activity will appear here once detection is enabled.
settings.insider.enableHint: Score local process behavior for exfiltration risk
settings.insider.note: Detection runs locally and scores process behavior. No process data leaves the device.
settings.insider.title: Insider Threat
settings.notifications.desktopHint: Show a system notification when a threat is detected
settings.notifications.note: Critical and danger threats always notify. Warning-level notifications require a Pro or Enterprise tier.
settings.notifications.soundHint: Play a sound when threats are detected
settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.ollama.endpointHint: Local Ollama server URL — runs fully offline
settings.ollama.note: Local AI keeps all analysis on this device. No API key required and nothing is sent to the cloud.
settings.pagerduty.enableHint: Route critical alerts to the PagerDuty Events API
settings.pagerduty.keyHint: Events API v2 integration routing key
settings.pagerduty.note: PagerDuty stays off until a routing key is set and a test succeeds. The routing key is encrypted at rest and never logged.
settings.pagerduty.severityHint: Only route alerts at or above this level
settings.pagerduty.testFail: Test failed — check the routing key and try again.
settings.pagerduty.title: PagerDuty
settings.remote.bindAddressHint: An IP or hostname on this machine
settings.remote.connectNoteSuffix: with the token above. The token is encrypted at rest and never logged.
settings.remote.enableHint: Accept event streams from headless agents over WebSocket
settings.remote.keyPathHint: PEM-encoded private key on this machine
settings.remote.title: Remote Agents
settings.remote.tlsNotReadyHint: Set a certificate and key below first
settings.remote.tlsReadyHint: Serve over wss:// instead of ws://
settings.remote.tokenHint: Agents must present this token to connect
settings.remote.warnExposed: The server is reachable from your network without TLS. The auth token and streamed events travel unencrypted.
settings.remote.warnInvalidHost: That bind address is not valid. The server will not start.
settings.remote.warnTlsNotReady: TLS is on but no certificate and key are set. The server will refuse to start.
settings.remote.whoCanConnectHint: Loopback keeps the server private to this computer
settings.restApi.bearerTokenHint: Required before the API will listen
settings.restApi.note: Bound to 127.0.0.1. Off until a token is set. Token encrypted at rest, never logged.
settings.restApi.portHint: Local bind port for the REST API
settings.restApi.title: REST API
settings.scanning.adaptiveHint: Automatically slow scans on battery power or when idle to save resources
settings.scanning.balancedDesc: Recommended — good balance of alerts and noise
settings.scanning.intervalHint: How often to scan for network connections
settings.scanning.paranoidDesc: Maximum sensitivity — more alerts, fewer missed threats
settings.scanning.sensitivityHint: Controls how aggressively Fortis flags connections as threats
settings.scanning.title: Scanning
settings.siem.enableHint: Stream alerts to the configured collector
settings.siem.note: Off until configured and a test succeeds. Credentials encrypted at rest, never logged.
settings.siem.severityHint: Only forward alerts at or above this level
settings.siem.testFail: Test failed — check the endpoint and token.
settings.siem.title: SIEM
settings.updates.confirmMessage: Fortis will close and reopen to finish installing the update. Continue?
settings.updates.disabledHint: Automatic updates are available in the installed app.
settings.updates.latest: You are on the latest version.
settings.updates.title: Updates
